---
name: Task Claim
about: Claim a task/module from the registry (TASKS.md)
title: '[CLAIM] '
labels: task-assignment
assignees: ''
---

**Contributor Information**
- **Contributor Name / Github Username**: 
- **Preferred Role**: [Role 1 (Feature Adder) / Role 2 (Bug Fixer / Verifier)]

**Task Information**
- **Module Name & Task ID**: [e.g. Module 1, Task 1.1 (Create registration and login)]
- **Current Registry Status**: [Open]

**Implementation / Verification Approach**
Provide a brief sentence on how you plan to approach this task (e.g. "I will implement a FastAPI router for this endpoint in `auth.py` and link it to JWT authentication services").

**Estimated Completion Date**
[e.g., June 25, 2026]
